modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Security settings on shared file storage seem to have changed.

full_description_text: So, the user was saying that when they were moving the X drive, something happened to the security on their files. They think now that not all users can see the folders like they used to. They want help to set it up so everyone can see everything again, but it’s a bit confusing on what exactly changed.
short_description: Security settings on shared file storage seem to have changed.
description: So, the user was saying that when they were moving the X drive, something happened to the security on their files. They think now that not all users can see the folders like they used to. They want help to set it up so everyone can see everything again, but it’s a bit confusing on what exactly changed.
